## Scope check

Confirm each item before requesting review:

- [ ] This change is limited to an approved correction
- [ ] This change does not touch UI, frontend, workflow, scraper, database, or automation surfaces
- [ ] This change does not edit generated outputs without maintainer approval
- [ ] I included evidence for factual corrections

Any context that helps with review.
